TSLA.reasoning: Catalyst window: Q1 2026 earnings passed April 22 (now 7 trading days ago). Post-earnings price continuation is the active catalyst window — earnings reactions in high-beta names like TSLA typically resolve direction within 5–10 trading days. Today (May 1) TSLA is surging ~3.8% intraday (daily close $381.63 → hourly current $396.09) on 2.74x average volume, confirming informed positioning is driving this move. The hourly OBV trend is up and not diverging. Structural catalysts reinforce: Musk stepping back from DOGE (incremental management re-engagement), unsupervised robotaxi commercial operation in Austin (no competitor match), and FSD Netherlands approval with rollout imminent. The Spring OTA update with Grok integration is a near-term positive narrative driver. Net news sentiment: positive (Musk DOGE exit, robotaxi, FSD Europe) offset by persistent negatives (worst delivery-production gap in TSLA history, JPMorgan $145 target, Rivian R2 competitive threat). Roll-up: net positive given the post-earnings price action vindicates the bull camp. Insider activity: quiet (no trades in 30 days) — neither confirming nor denying. Technical setup going in: hourly EMAs are aligned uptrend; price cleared the $382.29 hourly pivot resistance (10 tests, volume-confirmed) with 2.74x volume — this is a textbook catalyst-volume breakout. However, caution flags are real: hourly RSI at 70.5 (overbought), pct_b at 1.27 (above upper Bollinger Band), daily OBV trend is still down, and the daily price remains below the 50 EMA ($385.82) and 200 EMA ($389.24). The stock is approaching the analyst consensus target ($400.56) and the nearest resistance cluster at $409.28 (14 tests). Lessons check: recent NVDA catalyst trade stopped out on an overextended entry (RSI 81–87) — today’s hourly RSI of 70.5 is elevated but not extreme. Confidence is capped at 58 due to the post-earnings entry being 7 days in (partially priced), the overbought hourly condition, daily indicators not yet confirming the move, and the wiki noting that the Q1 earnings actual results have not yet been synthesized (the catalyst wiki is stale on the actual earnings outcome).
